nasb.text: “You shall make the court of the tabernacle. On the south side there shall be hangings for the court of fine twisted linen one hundred cubits long for one side;

esv.text: “You shall make the court of the tabernacle. On the south side the court shall have hangings of fine twined linen a hundred cubits long for one side.

cnv.text: “你要做會幕的院子。在南面，即向南的一面，要用撚的細麻為院子做帷幔，每邊長四十四公尺。

ccb.text: “要为圣幕围出一个院子。院子的南面要用细麻线做帷幔，长四十六米，
